testcase.name: test_profile_name_not_hardcoded_eric

failure.message: AssertionError: Name should not be hardcoded as 'Eric' assert 'Eric' != 'Eric' + where 'Eric' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfbdb954d47c0>('name') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfbdb954d47c0> = {'avoidMovements': ['Stone to shoulder', 'Very low box squats', 'Aggressive from-floor max deadlift'], 'basePRs': {'axleDeadlift': 600, 'axleOverhead': 240, 'backSquat': 500, 'benchPress': 365, ...}, 'bw12WeekGoal': 255.0, 'bwLongRunGoal': 230.0, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration6.py:52: in test_profile_name_not_hardcoded_eric assert data.get("name") != "Eric", "Name should not be hardcoded as 'Eric'" E AssertionError: Name should not be hardcoded as 'Eric' E assert 'Eric' != 'Eric' E + where 'Eric' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfbdb954d47c0>('name') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfbdb954d47c0> = {'avoidMovements': ['Stone to shoulder', 'Very low box squats', 'Aggressive from-floor max deadlift'], 'basePRs': {'axleDeadlift': 600, 'axleOverhead': 240, 'backSquat': 500, 'benchPress': 365, ...}, 'bw12WeekGoal': 255.0, 'bwLongRunGoal': 230.0, ...}.get
